heading: Step 1: Define an embedding function
body:
Create a function to generate embeddings using the OpenAI API:

```python
from typing import List

def get_embeddings(docs: List[str], model: str) -> List[List[float]]:
    """Generate embeddings using the OpenAI API."""
    docs = [doc.replace("\n", " ") for doc in docs]
    response = openai_client.embeddings.create(input=docs, model=model)
    return [r.embedding for r in response.data]
```

codeBlocks.content:
from typing import List

def get_embeddings(docs: List[str], model: str) -> List[List[float]]:
    """Generate embeddings using the OpenAI API."""
    docs = [doc.replace("\n", " ") for doc in docs]
    response = openai_client.embeddings.create(input=docs, model=model)
    return [r.embedding for r in response.data]
